seoTitle: How to Add a Discount in QuickBooks Online (Quick Guide)
metaDescription: A quick tutorial on adding discounts in QuickBooks Online, from navigating the interface to applying and managing them for seasonal or loyalty offers.
intro: Discounts are a simple way to boost sales or reward repeat customers, but you need to know where in QuickBooks Online to apply them correctly. This guide walks through navigating the interface, adding a discount to a transaction, and managing it going forward. Whether you're running a seasonal promotion or a loyalty offer, this covers what you need to apply it confidently.

steps.heading: Navigate the QuickBooks Online interface
steps.body: Find the transaction or invoice where you want to apply a discount within your QuickBooks Online dashboard.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step process to add the discount
steps.body: Enter the discount amount or percentage on the transaction, letting QuickBooks Online recalculate the total automatically.

steps.heading: Manage discounts effectively
steps.body: Track which transactions have discounts applied so you can review their impact on your overall revenue.

steps.heading: Automate your discount process
steps.body: Explore QuickBooks Online's automation options if you offer the same discount regularly, so you don't have to re-enter it each time.

faq.question: Can I set up a recurring discount for the same customer?
faq.answer: QuickBooks Online supports automation for repeat scenarios, so check its recurring transaction settings if you want a discount applied consistently.

faq.question: Do discounts show up separately on the invoice or statement?
faq.answer: Discounts typically appear as a line adjustment that reduces the invoice total, so your customer can see the discount was applied.

faq.question: Is this feature different from the customer invoice discount tool?
faq.answer: The core mechanics are the same — applying a discount percentage or amount to a transaction — whether you're working from a general invoice or a specific customer discount workflow.

faq.question: Can I remove a discount after it's been applied?
faq.answer: Yes, you can go back into the transaction and adjust or remove the discount before the invoice is finalized or sent.
